generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had those emergency drills in school? Those were the days when we actually cared about being prepared. Now? Our leaders would rather spend billions on overseas adventures than ensure we're ready at home. It's time to demand real civil defense investments - for our safety, our families, and our peace of mind. #PreparednessNotPanic #SafetyFirst
